violations.text: The recycling dumpster is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

Vegetables and dressings were observed held at 44-57 degrees Fahrenheit in the small prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was relocated to another refrigeration unit during time of inspection. The ambient air temperature was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit during time of visit. The pans stored on the top were not tight fitting in the unit. The person in charge rearranged the pans and made them tight fitting during time of inspection. The ambient air temperature dropped to 41 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Establishment must monitor prep unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

The deli display case had an ambient air temperature of 52 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Per person in charge, electrician had just been there to repair it. Food was observed held at 41-42 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Per person in charge, food had been placed in the unit about 30 minutes prior to inspection. Display case was taken out of service during time of inspection. Food must not be stored in the prep unit until the ambient air temperature drops to 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below and the internal food temperature is maintained at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Repair services came during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
